title: Anthropic Upgrades Claude Voice Mode: Supports Flagship Models and Cross-Ecosystem Collaboration with Third-Party Applications
excerpt: Anthropic announced on July 23, 2026, a major update to the voice mode of its conversational assistant Claude, officially introducing support for the Opus
content_html:
Anthropic announced on July 23, 2026, a major update to the voice mode of its conversational assistant Claude, officially introducing support for the Opus and Sonnet models, as well as adding cross-application ecosystem automation capabilities. This marks an important step forward in AI voice interaction, transitioning from basic question-and-answer functions to complex task fulfillment.

Previously, Claude's voice mode relied only on the lightweight Haiku model, which offered extremely fast response times but had clear limitations when handling deep reasoning and complex tasks. After this upgrade, the voice mode will default to inheriting the last model selected by the user in text chats (including Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku), and automatically match the fastest version within each model to ensure response efficiency.

At the same time, the voice mode has officially connected with application ecosystems such as Gmail, Google Calendar, Slack, Canva, and Notion. Users can now directly trigger complex operations such as updating meeting schedules, drafting emails, or creating documents through voice commands, forming a differentiated capability advantage compared to competitors in terms of tool integration.

In terms of language support, the new version now officially covers 10 major languages, including English, French, German, Hindi, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese (Brazil), and Spanish (Latin America/Spain), based on earlier beta tests. Users can manually select and switch languages in the settings.

Currently, this voice mode update is available to all platform beta test users. Free users can only connect to a single application when using the Haiku model, while paid subscribers can unlock full model selection and multi-application collaboration capabilities.

Although Anthropic has not yet restructured the underlying voice stack (still using a turn-based dialogue mechanism, without adopting a full-duplex architecture), combining the general reasoning capabilities of high-level large models with external toolchains has significantly expanded the application boundaries of voice interaction in areas such as business reasoning, product discussions, and office automation.

Users can manually select and switch languages in the settings.

sentences.zh: 语言支持方面，根据前期测试情况，新版本目前正式覆盖英语、法语、德语、印地语、印尼语、意大利语、日语、韩语、葡萄牙语（巴西）、西班牙语（拉美/西班牙）等10种主要语言。

sentences.en: Free users can only connect to a single application when using the Haiku model, while paid subscribers can unlock full model selection and multi-application collaboration capabilities.
sentences.zh: 免费用户在使用 Haiku 模型时只能连接到单个应用程序，而付费订阅者可以解锁完整的模型选择和多应用程序协作功能。

blocks.html_en: Although Anthropic has not yet restructured the underlying voice stack (still using a turn-based dialogue mechanism, without adopting a full-duplex architecture), combining the general reasoning capabilities of high-level large models with external toolchains has significantly expanded the application boundaries of voice interaction in areas such as business reasoning, product discussions, and office automation.

sentences.en: Although Anthropic has not yet restructured the underlying voice stack (still using a turn-based dialogue mechanism, without adopting a full-duplex architecture), combining the general reasoning capabilities of high-level large models with external toolchains has significantly expanded the application boundaries of voice interaction in areas such as business reasoning, product discussions, and office automation.
sentences.zh: 尽管Anthropic尚未重构底层语音堆栈（仍然采用回合制对话机制，未采用全双工架构），但将高层大模型的通用推理能力与外部工具链相结合，显着拓展了语音交互在业务推理、产品讨论、办公自动化等领域的应用边界。

content_html_zh:
Anthropic 于 2026 年 7 月 23 日宣布，对其会话助手 Claude 的语音模式进行重大更新，正式引入对 Opus 和 Sonnet 模型的支持，并添加跨应用生态系统的自动化功能。 这标志着人工智能语音交互向前迈出了重要一步，从基本的问答功能过渡到复杂的任务完成。

此前，克劳德的语音模式仅依赖于轻量级俳句模型，该模型提供极快的响应时间，但在处理深度推理和复杂任务时存在明显的局限性。 此次升级后，语音模式将默认继承用户在文字聊天时最后选择的模型（包括Opus、Sonnet、Haiku），并自动匹配每个模型内最快的版本，以保证响应效率。

同时，语音模式已正式接入Gmail、Google Calendar、Slack、Canva、Notion等应用生态。 用户现在可以通过语音命令直接触发更新会议日程、起草电子邮件或创建文档等复杂操作，在工具集成方面形成与竞争对手的差异化能力优势。

语言支持方面，根据前期测试情况，新版本目前正式覆盖英语、法语、德语、印地语、印尼语、意大利语、日语、韩语、葡萄牙语（巴西）、西班牙语（拉美/西班牙）等10种主要语言。 用户可以在设置中手动选择和切换语言。

目前，该语音模式更新已向所有平台 Beta 测试用户开放。 免费用户在使用 Haiku 模型时只能连接到单个应用程序，而付费订阅者可以解锁完整的模型选择和多应用程序协作功能。

尽管Anthropic尚未重构底层语音堆栈（仍然采用回合制对话机制，未采用全双工架构），但将高层大模型的通用推理能力与外部工具链相结合，显着拓展了语音交互在业务推理、产品讨论、办公自动化等领域的应用边界。
